title: STFU Disconnect
body:
[![][cf-shield]][cf-link]

### This is a port of paper's [MC-271325](https://mojira.dev/MC-271325) patch to fabric and neo.

Error sending packet clientbound/minecraft:disconnect!

Error sending packet clientbound/minecraft:disconnect!

Error sending packet clientbound/minecraft:disconnect!

Chat disabled for 3 seconds!

Available for Fabric and Neoforge 1.21.x/26.1.x/26.2

[cf-shield]: https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1481723?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&label=curseforge&labelColor=black&color=%23F16436
[cf-link]: https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/stfudisconnect
